name: Mushroom-Stuffed Eggs (Marguerite Patten)
recipeInstructions:
1. Hard-boil and shell the eggs.
2. Preheat the oven to 190°C/375°F, Gas Mark 5.
3. Wipe and chop half of the mushrooms finely.
4. Heat half the butter or margarine, add the chopped mushrooms, and cook for 3 minutes.
5. Cut each egg in half lengthways; scoop out the egg yolks with a teaspoon.
6. Mash the egg yolks and blend them with the cooked mushrooms. Season to taste.
7. Fill the whites with the mushroom mixture.
8. Slice the remaining mushrooms and cook in the remaining butter or margarine.
9. Place the sliced mushrooms in a single layer in an ovenproof dish, arrange the eggs on top of the mushrooms, and bake for 5 to 10 minutes.
10. Sprinkle with grated cheese and serve immediately.
